sections.heading: A. Cụm động từ có 3 từ (Three-word Phrasal Verbs)
sections.content:
Định nghĩa:

  • Three-word phrasal verbs = Verb + Particle + Preposition
  • Ví dụ: look forward to, come up with, get on with
  • Không thể tách rời các thành phần
  • Có nghĩa khác với nghĩa gốc của động từ

sections.heading: B. Các cụm động từ 3 từ phổ biến
sections.content:
1. LOOK FORWARD TO (mong chờ):

  • Structure: look forward to + V-ing/noun
  • Ex: I look forward to hearing from you.
  • Ex: We look forward to the meeting.

2. COME UP WITH (nghĩ ra):

  • Structure: come up with + noun (idea, solution, plan)
  • Ex: She came up with a brilliant idea.
  • Ex: Can you come up with a solution?

3. GET ON WITH (hòa hợp với):

  • Structure: get on with + person
  • Ex: I get on with my colleagues.
  • Ex: Do you get on with your boss?

4. CATCH UP WITH (theo kịp):

  • Structure: catch up with + person/thing
  • Ex: I need to catch up with my work.
  • Ex: Let's catch up with old friends.

5. KEEP UP WITH (theo kịp, duy trì):

  • Structure: keep up with + person/thing/changes
  • Ex: Keep up with technology trends.
  • Ex: I can't keep up with the pace.

6. PUT UP WITH (chịu đựng):

  • Structure: put up with + noun/V-ing
  • Ex: I can't put up with the noise.
  • Ex: She puts up with difficult customers.

7. RUN OUT OF (cạn kiệt):

  • Structure: run out of + noun
  • Ex: We ran out of time.
  • Ex: Don't run out of patience.

8. LOOK UP TO (ngưỡng mộ):

  • Structure: look up to + person
  • Ex: I look up to my mentor.
  • Ex: Children look up to their parents.

9. FACE UP TO (đối mặt với):

  • Structure: face up to + problem/reality/fact
  • Ex: Face up to your mistakes.
  • Ex: We must face up to the challenge.

10. LIVE UP TO (đáp ứng kỳ vọng):

  • Structure: live up to + expectations/standards/reputation
  • Ex: Live up to your potential.
  • Ex: The product lived up to expectations.

11. MAKE UP FOR (bù đắp):

  • Structure: make up for + loss/mistake/time
  • Ex: Make up for lost time.
  • Ex: How can I make up for my mistake?

sections.heading: C. Lưu ý quan trọng
sections.content:
1. Không thể tách rời:

  • ✓ I look forward to meeting you.
  • ✗ I look you forward to meeting.

2. Giới từ cuối cùng:

  • Sau 'to': look forward to, look up to, face up to, live up to
  • Sau 'with': come up with, get on with, catch up with, keep up with, put up with
  • Sau 'of': run out of
  • Sau 'for': make up for

3. Động từ sau giới từ:

  • Nếu có động từ sau, phải thêm -ing
  • Ex: I look forward to working with you. (NOT: to work)
  • Ex: She came up with solving the problem. (nếu dùng động từ)

exercises.question: Complete: 'I need to catch _____ my work.'
Choose: 'Keep _____ technology trends.'
exercises.explanation: 'Keep up with' - theo kịp, duy trì.

exercises.question: Which is correct?
options: I look forward to meet you.
I look forward to meeting you.
I look to forward meeting you.

exercises.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: She gets on with her boss.
She gets with on her boss.
She gets her boss on with.
She on with gets her boss.
exercises.explanation: Get on with + person - không thể tách rời.

exercises.question_text: Decide if these sentences are correct (True/False):
options: I look forward to hearing from you.
She came up with a great idea.
I get with on my colleagues.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Look forward to + V-ing. b) True - Come up with. c) False - Phải là 'get on with'. d) True - Run out of.

exercises.question_text: Mark True if the phrasal verb is used correctly:
options: I can't put up with the noise.
exercises.explanation: a) True - Keep up with. b) True - Put up with. c) True - Look up to. d) False - Phải là 'face up to'.

exercises.question_text: Complete: I look _____ _____ meeting you. (three words total)
Complete: She came _____ _____ a solution. (three words total)
Complete: I get _____ _____ my boss. (three words total)
